BasicAuth.description: Use Basic auth with username `token` and password `x`.

email.description: Primary email address of the customer.

document.description: Optional government-issued document information for the customer.

phone.description: Optional customer phone number in E.164-like numeric format with 11 digits.

externalRef.description: Optional external reference from your system used to correlate this customer.

address.description: Optional billing or residential address of the customer.

ip_address.description: Optional IP address associated with the customer creation request.

parameters.description: Free-text search across customer name, email and document.

parameters.description: Filter by exact customer document number.

parameters.name: ip_address
parameters.description: Filter customers by last known IP address.

post.description: Create a new subscription. Charges the supplied `pgct_` card token; the subscription is created with status `active`, or `trialing` when `trial_end` is set.

trial_end.description: Trial end timestamp (ISO 8601). Must be in the future.
Trial end (ISO 8601). Future date triggers Jornada 2 (authorization only).

customerId.description: Public customer id (UUID) the subscription belongs to.

intervalCount.description: Number of interval units per billing cycle.

currentPeriodStart.description: Start of the current billing period.

currentPeriodEnd.description: End of the current billing period.

cancelAtPeriodEnd.description: Whether cancellation is scheduled at period end.

failurePolicy.description: Behavior on a failed billing attempt.

retryOffsetsDays.description: Days after a failed attempt to retry.

cardLast4.description: Last four digits of the billing card.

tangible.description: Whether the product is a tangible good.

products.description: Snapshot of catalog products billed each cycle.

transactions.description: Transactions billed under this subscription. Included on GET by id.

get.description: List subscriptions for the calling company using cursor pagination. Supports filtering by status, customer email, and creation date range.

parameters.name: created_after
parameters.description: Filter to subscriptions created at or after this ISO 8601 timestamp.

parameters.name: created_before
parameters.description: Filter to subscriptions created at or before this ISO 8601 timestamp.

external_ref.description: Optional idempotency key or external reference from your system.

method.description: Payment method to be used for the transaction.

installments.description: Number of installments for the transaction when applicable.

interest_rate.description: Installment interest rate (%) embedded in the charged amount, when applicable.

id.description: Existing buyer identifier in your system or Pagou.

name.description: Full name of the buyer when id is not provided.

email.description: Email address of the buyer when id is not provided.

birth_date.description: Buyer birth date in string format.

price.description: Unit price in cents for the product.

quantity.description: Quantity of this product being purchased.

tangible.description: Indicates if the product is a physical good.

sku.description: Optional SKU or product identifier from your system.

products.description: List of products associated with the transaction.

token.description: Optional payment token for card transactions. Use 'pgct_' for single-use or 'pgpm_' for reusable (upsell) tokens.

notify_url.description: Optional HTTPS URL to receive webhooks for this transaction.

metadata.description: Optional metadata string for your own reference.

traceable.description: Whether the transaction should be traceable for fraud or risk analysis.

ip_address.description: IPv4 or IPv6 address of the buyer or request origin.

id.description: Unique identifier of the transaction (numeric or UUID).

barcode.description: Barcode string for boleto or voucher, when applicable.

digitable_line.description: Digitable line representation of the boleto or voucher.

url.description: URL where the boleto or voucher can be viewed or downloaded.

expiration_date.description: Expiration date of the boleto or voucher.

instructions.description: Additional payment instructions for the boleto or voucher.

receipt_url.description: URL to access the payment receipt, when available.

buyer.description: Buyer details associated with the transaction.

external_ref.description: External reference originally provided by your system.

net_amount.description: Net amount in cents that will be settled after fees.

estimated_fee.description: Estimated processing fee in cents for this transaction.

installments.description: Number of installments for the transaction, if applicable.

key.description: Key of the additional information entry.

value.description: Value of the additional information entry.

informations.description: Additional information entries returned by the processor or gateway.

paid_amount.description: Total amount in cents that has been paid.

paid_at.description: Timestamp of when the transaction was paid, if applicable.

method.description: Payment method actually used in the transaction.

pix.description: PIX payment details when the method is PIX.

qr_code.description: PIX QR code payload for payment.

end_to_end_id.description: End-to-end identifier assigned to the PIX payment, when available.

receipt_url.description: URL to access the PIX payment receipt, when available.

refunded_amount.description: Total refunded amount in cents for this transaction.

price.description: Unit price in cents for the product.

products.description: List of products included in the transaction.

metadata.description: Arbitrary key-value metadata associated with the transaction.

traceable.description: Indicates whether the transaction is traceable.

ip_address.description: IPv4 or IPv6 address associated with the transaction.

amount.description: Split amount in cents to allocate to the recipient.

charge_processing_fee.description: Indicates if processing fees are charged to this recipient.

splits.description: Revenue split configuration for this transaction.

status.description: Current external status of the transaction.

next_action.description: Next action required to complete the transaction, such as 3DS authentication.

type.description: The type of next action required.

client_secret.description: Client secret for SDK polling authentication.

expires_at.description: Expiration timestamp for the challenge session.

created_at.description: Date and time when the transaction was created.

updated_at.description: Date and time when the transaction was last updated.

put.description:
WARNING: Partial refunds are available only when the selected payment method supports them.



Refund a transaction

amount.description: Optional refund amount in cents. If omitted, the full amount may be refunded.

reason.description: Optional free-text reason for the refund.

put.description: Set or update delivery tracking information on a paid transaction. Identify the transaction by the UUID returned as its public `id`. `tracking_code` is required; `delivery_status`, `tracking_url`, and `tracking_company` are optional. Omitting an optional field leaves its current value unchanged, while sending `null` for `tracking_url` or `tracking_company` clears it. When `delivery_status` is omitted, the existing status is preserved (or defaults to `in_transit` the first time delivery is set). A shipment already marked `delivered` cannot be moved back to `waiting` or `in_transit` (returns 409). Supports optimistic concurrency through `If-Match` with the transaction ETag (returns 412 on mismatch).

tracking_code.description: Carrier tracking code for the shipment. Required.

delivery_status.description: Delivery status of the shipment. One of `waiting`, `in_transit`, or `delivered`. When omitted, the existing status is preserved on update, or defaults to `in_transit` on the first update.

tracking_url.description: Public URL where the buyer can track the shipment. Must start with `http://` or `https://`. Send `null` to clear a previously set value; omit to leave it unchanged.

tracking_company.description: Name of the carrier handling the shipment. Send `null` to clear a previously set value; omit to leave it unchanged.

origin.description: Optional origin identifier for the transfer (e.g. your platform name or channel).
